ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: (ISPICKVAL(Customer__r.Sales_Region__c, 'Hisense USA') || ISPICKVAL(Customer__r.Sales_Region__c, 'Hisense Malaysia') || ISPICKVAL(Customer__r.Sales_Region__c, 'Hisense Mexico') || ISPICKVAL(Customer__r.Sales_Region__c, 'Hisense Australia') || ISPICKVAL(Customer__r.Sales_Region__c, 'Hisense South Africa') ) && ! ISBLANK( TEXT(Classification__c) ) && !ISPICKVAL( Classification__c ,'Customer of Oversea Company' )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Only 'Customer of Oversea Company' can be selected in the classification
